name: Honey Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the honey and hot water until well blended over low heat.
2. Allow mixture to cool, then add lemon juice and cold water.
3. Pour into iced glasses.
The honey/water syrup can be refrigerated and used to make lemonade one serving at a time. To serve, mix 4 tablespoons syrup with 1½ tablespoons lemon juice and 1 cup water per person. Pour into iced glasses.
